div1.entryFree: Nicholas, name; 1) Saint N., the patron of scholars: try me in thy paper. There; and Saint N. be thy speed, Gent. III, 1, 300. Saint --' clerks == highwaymen: H4A II, 1, 68. H4A II, 1, 68 2) Sir N. Gawsey: H4A V, 4, 45. H4A V, 4, 45 3) N. Hopkins: H8 I, 1, 221 (O. Edd. Michael). I, 2, 147. 4) Sir N. Vaux: H8 II, 1, 96. H8 II, 1, 96 5) a servant in Shr. IV, 1, 92.
